title: IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate II Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) has officially announced the Research Associate II Posts. Those candidates who have qualified in the Ph.D, M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
